name: Oven Steamed Flounder Cantonese Style
recipeIngredient: 4 Scallions trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces
4 (4 oz) Fillets of flounder or red snapper
2 tablespoons Light or reduced soy sauce
A dash of hot chili oil – or
A dash of red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a baking dish, place 1/3 of the julienned ginger and scallions on the bottom.
2. Place the fish fillets atop the ginger and scallions.
3. Cover the fish with the remaining scallions and ginger.
4. Combine the soy sauce, sesame oil, sugar, hot chili oil or red pepper flakes in a small bowl.
5. Pour the mixture over the fish.
6. Let stand for 15 minutes.
7. Cover with foil and bake at 375°F (190°C) for approximately 15 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily when pressed gently.
8. Garnish with cilantro before serving. Enjoy with rice pilaf.
